mapper.sql: id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, province, city, district, adress, post_code, linkman, link_phone, link_mobile, english_address, english_linkman, mail, delflag, create_time, creator, update_time, updator
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_warehouse_address
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_warehouse_address (id, warehouse_code, warehouse_name, province, city, district, adress, post_code, linkman, link_phone, link_mobile, english_address, english_linkman, mail, delflag, create_time, creator, update_time, updator) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{linkPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{linkMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{englishAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{englishLinkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR})

warehouse_code,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_warehouse_address
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_name = #{record.warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
province = #{record.province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{record.city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
district = #{record.district,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
adress = #{record.adress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
post_code = #{record.postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
linkman = #{record.linkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
link_phone = #{record.linkPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
link_mobile = #{record.linkMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
english_address = #{record.englishAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
english_linkman = #{record.englishLinkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail = #{record.mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=BIT},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_warehouse_address set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_name = #{record.warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, province = #{record.province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{record.city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, district = #{record.district,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adress = #{record.adress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, post_code = #{record.postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, linkman = #{record.linkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, link_phone = #{record.linkPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, link_mobile = #{record.linkMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, english_address = #{record.englishAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, english_linkman = #{record.englishLinkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail = #{record.mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=BIT}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{record.updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_warehouse_address
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
warehouse_name = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
district = #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
adress = #{adress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
post_code = #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
linkman = #{linkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
link_phone = #{linkPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
link_mobile = #{linkMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
english_address = #{englishAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
english_linkman = #{englishLinkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mail = #{mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=BIT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updator = #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.ops_warehouse_address set warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, province = #{province,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, city = #{city,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, district = #{district,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, adress = #{adress,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, post_code = #{postCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, linkman = #{linkman,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, link_phone = #{linkPhone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, link_mobile = #{linkMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, english_address = #{englishAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, english_linkman = #{englishLinkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mail = #{mail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=BIT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updator = #{updator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
